summary: E-commerce app with infinite scroll category pages. Refactoring public category page to use a custom `useCategoryProductsInfinite` hook mirroring the working home page infinite scroll pattern, fixing product disappearance during pagination.
architectural_notes: Infinite scroll pattern: encapsulate all pagination/accumulation logic in custom hooks (not components). Component only renders. Reference: useHomepageCategoriesInfinite.
Category page uses useCategoryProductsInfinite hook; page sizes are mobile=5, desktop=10; scroll threshold 500px throttled.
known_issues: Category page infinite scroll (pre-fix): manual accumulation in component causes flicker/disappearance of products during pagination.

existing_features.title: Create a new custom hook `useCategoryProductsInfinite` in `frontend/src/hooks/useCategoryProductsInfinite.ts` that encapsulates all pagination logic for category products. The hook must: accept `categoryId` (string) and `pageSize` (number) parameters; internally manage accumulated products array, current page, initial loading state, load-more loading state, hasMore flag, and totalCount; expose `{ products, isLoading, isLoadingMore, error, hasMore, loadMore, totalCount }`; use `useCategoryProductsPaginated` as the underlying data fetcher; prevent duplicate fetches with an in-flight guard; reset all state when `categoryId` or `pageSize` changes; and clean up on unmount. Mirror the architectural pattern of `useHomepageCategoriesInfinite`.

Refactor `frontend/src/pages/public/CategoryPage.tsx` to use the new `useCategoryProductsInfinite` hook and remove all manual pagination state management. The component must: remove `page`, `accumulatedProducts`, `useEffect`-based accumulation, and timer-based logic; use `useIsMobile` to set `pageSize` (5 mobile / 10 desktop); use `useInfiniteScroll` with a throttled scroll handler (500px threshold) and a sentinel ref via `useIntersectionObserver`; render the product grid at all times when products exist; render the load-more spinner separately below the grid (never replace the grid); show an initial full-screen spinner only on first load; show end-of-results message when `hasMore` is false and products exist; preserve all Spanish UI text; and not modify `index.css`.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix public category page infinite scroll so products don't disappear during pagination by creating a useCategoryProductsInfinite hook mirroring the home page pattern
